arts.ttl: Bayern Munich drop first major hint over Harry Kane Tottenham transfer return
arts.sum: And Bayern may well have dropped the first hint that Kane could return to the Premier League soon, and a reunion with Tottenham. Gyokeres has been scouted by a number of Premier League clubs, with Bayern now among his suitors.

arts.ttl: The looming Tottenham transfer problem Ange Postecoglou needs to fix soon
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou will require a new goalkeeper before the start of the 2025/26 season in order to challenge Guglielmo Vicario and it raises an old problem. The 36-year-old penned a new contract last season, which comes to an end this summer.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou praises classy Pedro Porro gesture and what he does behind the scenes at Tottenham
arts.sum: Speaking after Spurs ' win against Aston Villa on Sunday, Porro had said: "First of all, I just want to say that, well, for a Spaniard, today, for all Spaniards, it’s a sad day. Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou believes that Pedro Porro's gesture to donate part of his salary to help those affected by the catastrophic floods in Valencia is just part of who the Spaniard is.
